name: GLP-1 Metabolic Medicines
what: Incretin-based drugs that regulate appetite and blood sugar, producing substantial weight loss and cardiovascular benefit across large trials.
how: Engineered peptides mimic gut hormones to slow gastric emptying and signal satiety, delivered as weekly injections and, increasingly, oral forms.

name: Liquid Biopsy Diagnostics
what: Blood tests that detect circulating tumour DNA and other markers to find cancers earlier and track treatment response without invasive tissue biopsy.
how: Ultra-sensitive sequencing and methylation analysis of cell-free DNA flag tumour signals and tissue of origin from a routine blood draw.

name: In-Vivo CRISPR Therapies
what: Gene-editing therapies delivered directly into the body to correct disease-causing mutations, moving beyond ex-vivo cell editing.
how: Lipid nanoparticles or viral vectors carry CRISPR machinery to target tissues such as the liver, where it edits the faulty gene in place.

name: AI Radiology Triage
what: Clinically-validated models that flag urgent findings on scans and act as a second reader, cutting time-to-diagnosis for strokes and cancers.
how: Deep networks trained on labelled imaging datasets score studies for critical findings and route them up the radiologist worklist.

name: Precision Oncology (Liquid Biopsies)
use: Early detection and personalized treatment of cancer.
what: Analyzing circulating tumor DNA in blood samples.
how: Real-time tracking of disease progression through non-invasive testing.
